pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh which explicitly injects a pick with station code 'TOLI'.
Verified in setup_task.sh which uses the network code 'GE' for the injected pick.
Verified in setup_task.sh which sets the pick phase hint and arrival phase to 'P'.
Verified from task description and README.md scoring criteria which explicitly require updating the phase to 'PP'.
Verified in setup_task.sh which launches 'scolv', and export_result.sh which checks if 'scolv' is running.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes real earthquake data (2024 Noto Peninsula, USGS ID us6000m0xl) and real GEOFON station metadata. The setup script explicitly injects an arrival for station GE.TOLI into the database with an initial phase of 'P'. The goal is to use the scolv GUI application to modify this specific arrival's phase to 'PP' and commit the origin. Notably, no waveform data for GE.TOLI is included in the underlying dataset, so the task relies purely on modifying the existing database arrival record via the GUI.
